title: Specklinia truncicola
taxonomy: Specklinia truncicola is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is classified as a terrestrial epiphyte, meaning it grows on the ground but has adapted to absorb moisture and nutrients from the air. It belongs to the genus Specklinia, which is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. The exact classification of Specklinia truncicola is as follows: family Orchidaceae, subfamily Epidendroideae, tribe Epidendreae, subtribe Pleurothallidinae, genus Specklinia, species S. truncicola. The classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup.
